title: Telehealth Compliance Anchored To Participant Proposal
content: A participant operating AI-assisted prescription renewal must adhere to Utah's telehealth provider requirements in §26B-4-704, with specific subsections deemed satisfied by following the patient-journey and escalation protocols described in the participant's Proposal (Schedule B). Certain subsections (e.g., the patient-records portability default) are inapplicable; others are substituted by Proposal-section conformance.
